description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton with a predominantly red, white, and green color scheme. The front panel displays the brand 'BRAVO' in large white letters on a red background, with additional text indicating the flavor as apple, mango, and passionfruit juice. The lower section of the carton features realistic images of apples, mangoes, and passionfruit, visually representing the juice flavor. The top of the carton is angled and features a white screw cap positioned off-center, typical of modern juice packaging. The sides of the carton are similarly decorated, while the back is plain with a red and white color block. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed to attract attention in a retail or urban environment.
description: A colorful rectangular juice carton labeled 'BRAVO', featuring fruit imagery and a white screw cap on top. The packaging is visually appealing with red, green, and white tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'BRAVO' brand, fruit images, and product flavor details prominently.
description_view_1: Angled front-left view revealing the screw cap and more of the side panel's fruit imagery.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain red and white panel with no branding or fruit images.
description_view_3: Angled front-right view highlighting the screw cap and the continuation of the fruit imagery on the side.
